description: Unified avalanche forecast schema — the target format for normalizing CAIC and UAC Native data into a common structure. This is what avalanche.org essentially does behind the scenes.

avalanche_problems.description: Plain text description of the problem

example.bottom_line: Plain text summary of conditions and travel advice

field_definitions.source_region: Region/zone name from the source center
field_definitions.overall_danger.rating: Integer 1-5 per North American Avalanche Danger Scale
field_definitions.overall_danger.name: Standard danger name: Low, Moderate, Considerable, High, Extreme
field_definitions.danger_by_elevation: Danger rating broken out by elevation band (above/near/below treeline)
field_definitions.avalanche_problems[].type: Standard problem name per avalanche.org taxonomy
field_definitions.avalanche_problems[].likelihood: Likelihood string: Unlikely, Possible, Likely, Very Likely, Almost Certain
field_definitions.avalanche_problems[].aspects: Array of cardinal/intercardinal aspects: N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW
field_definitions.avalanche_problems[].size: Destructive size range as decimal numbers
